title: Note configuration file requirements
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

We've had a couple of comments that the required configuration
files are not as documented as they should be.  Adding a note to
the install and troubleshooting guides to hopefully help.

comments.body: Looks like unrelated ubuntu errors in the tests.
@rhatdan, but still doesn't like me, can you retest this please?

:pushpin: Commit 1d10436 has been approved by `rhatdan`
